overall.description: A third-person game engine scene showing a female character walking across a vast, flat white salt flat or beach terrain. The character moves steadily toward the horizon with calm ocean waters visible to the left and distant cliffs ahead under a clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the flat white terrain toward the distant horizon with consistent pace

entered.detail: calm blue sea stretching to the horizon along the left side of the frame
low-lying rocky landmass visible on the horizon ahead
vast expanse of flat white ground covering the foreground and middle ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks continuously across an expansive, empty white salt flat under bright midday sun. The ocean lies calm to the left while distant rocky formations mark the horizon ahead. No other entities or structures are present in this desolate coastal environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate, sun-drenched coastal expanse that maintains a sense of vast isolation. It begins with the character walking steadily across an expansive white salt flat under the glare of the midday sun. As the camera tracks forward, the scene emphasizes the stark contrast between the bright terrain and the calm, blue ocean stretching out to the left. The perspective then shifts toward the horizon, where the empty landscape gradually leads the eye toward distant rocky formations. Finally, the movement continues through the silent environment, reinforcing the scale of the empty flats against the distant cliffs.
